hero.title: UGC Unboxing Video
hero.description: Turn product packaging and first-use moments into authentic unboxing content. This workflow creates creator-style UGC videos you can deploy across TikTok, Reels, and ecommerce campaigns.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Describe your product and unboxing scenario

steps.title: Describe your product and target audience
steps.description: Input basic details about your product, packaging, main selling points, and who this unboxing video is for.

steps.title: Define the unboxing scenario
steps.description: Describe the setting, mood, and style of the unboxing: desk setup, creator personality, camera perspective, and platform format.

steps.title: Generate UGC-style unboxing video
steps.description: Sora 2 creates an authentic unboxing-style video that highlights packaging, first impressions, and product details in a natural storytelling flow.

steps.title: Preview and reuse across campaigns
steps.description: Download and reuse the generated unboxing video across multiple campaigns, landing pages, and social media posts.

whoIsFor.title: Perfect for product launches and review-style content

items.question: What is the UGC Unboxing Video workflow?
items.answer: UGC Unboxing Video is an AI workflow that helps you create authentic unboxing-style product videos. It focuses on packaging, first impressions, and key product details so you can quickly generate social-ready content.

items.question: What kind of input do I need to start?
items.answer: You provide a short description of your product, packaging, target audience, and the unboxing scenario you want to present. The workflow uses this information to guide the generated video.

items.question: Who should use this workflow?
items.answer: This workflow is ideal for e-commerce brands, marketing teams, agencies, and creators who need realistic unboxing-style videos for product launches, ads, and social media.

items.question: What type of output can I expect?
items.answer: You get an AI-generated unboxing-style video that feels like UGC content: natural camera moves, focus on packaging, and clear view of product features for viewers.

items.question: Can I use the generated videos in paid ads and campaigns?
items.answer: Yes. Subject to OpenCreator’s terms of use and underlying model policies, you can use generated unboxing videos in marketing campaigns, landing pages, and social channels.

items.question: How is this different from other UGC promo workflows?
items.answer: While other workflows focus on generic promotional shots, UGC Unboxing Video is optimized specifically for first-open experience: packaging reveal, product removal, and initial hands-on moments.

webPage.name: UGC Unboxing Video – AI Product Unboxing Workflow
webPage.description: Create authentic AI-powered UGC unboxing videos that showcase packaging, first impressions, and key product details for your brand.
